sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29547" key="dustratope/deutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυστρᾰτοπέδευτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29547.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ill-suited for encamping</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
